title: Backpack joins race for 24/7 stock markets with tokenized equities
summary: Backpack has launched 24/7 trading for tokenized U.S. equities, joining a growing trend in crypto that allows investors to trade stocks around the clock. This move comes as tokenized stocks become one of the fastest-growing corners of crypto, with both crypto exchanges and traditional finance firms racing to expand 24/7 trading.
body:
Backpack, a crypto platform, has introduced 24/7 trading for tokenized U.S. equities, allowing investors to buy and sell stocks at any time. This launch is part of a broader trend in the crypto industry, where tokenized stocks are becoming one of the fastest-growing segments. Tokenized stocks are digital representations of traditional stocks, enabling them to be traded on blockchain platforms.

The platform's move comes as tokenized stocks gain popularity, with exchanges and traditional finance firms racing to expand 24/7 trading, offering investors more flexibility and accessibility. Backpack's entry into this market highlights the growing interest in blending traditional finance with blockchain technology.

For everyday investors, this development means more opportunities to trade stocks outside of traditional market hours. This could be particularly beneficial for those in different time zones or who prefer to manage their investments at their convenience. The ability to trade 24/7 can also potentially reduce the impact of market volatility during standard trading hours.

As the trend of tokenized equities continues to grow, more platforms are likely to follow suit. Investors should keep an eye on regulatory developments and the performance of these tokenized assets. Understanding the risks and benefits of trading tokenized stocks will be crucial for making informed investment decisions.
twitterThread: Backpack just launched 24/7 trading for tokenized U.S. stocks. No more waiting for market hours!
Tokenized stocks are digital versions of traditional stocks, tradable on blockchain platforms. Exchanges and traditional finance firms are racing to offer this 24/7 convenience.

This could be a game-changer for investors in different time zones. Keep an eye on regulatory developments and performance. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-07-11-backpack-enters-247-stock-trading-with-tokenized-equities
